---
title: "Annie Louise Cazenove"
---

## Annie Louise Cazenove

**Dates:** (29 Dec 1854-18 Dec 1933)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1882-8)

### Biography

She first seems to have entered CMY’s life as an enthusiastic member of the Spider society, writing as the 'Muffin Man'.  Subsequently she assisted Lady Brabazon (later the Countess of Meath) in her charities; she lived at Ravensleigh, Betchworth, Surrey, daughter of Alfred Parr Cazenove and Louise.   [LG Cazenove]

### Letters

- Letter from July 30th [1900]
- Letter from Oct 10 [1899]
- [To Mary Yonge, July 1st[1899]](../letters/3409_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from Aug 12th 1890
- Letter from Feb 8th 1888
- Letter from May 28th [1887]
- Letter from [?April, 1885][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Jan 21st 1881 [for 1882][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from March 30. [1880s?]
- Letter from [1880s, 1890s?]
- Letter from September 21, 1875.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
